author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for a full src/coordinator/ subsystem with task delegation queue + dependency graph, multi-subagent swarm mode with shared context, teammate roles, agent identity/color tracking, cross-session handoff state machine. Not addressable in a cleanup pass: multi-day feature implementation reading /home/doll/claude-code/coordinator/ TS source (~external research) plus a non-trivial new src/coordinator/ module hooking into transcript.rs, subagent.rs, and session lifecycle. Phase 1 spec partially captured in #532. Tracked under cc-coordinator-tasks label.
